# PAIRIS general/default Python environment.
# Used by the input-generation scripts (Python standard library only) and by
# result collation (pandas). Tested with Python 3.12.7 on Rocky Linux 8.10.
#
# Create this in a conda env (or uv venv) and set its name via the `conda_env`
# parameter (default: "pairis").
#
# For the optional Rosetta binding-energy stage, use env/requirements-rosetta.txt
# in a separate environment instead.
pandas==2.2.3
polars==0.20.31
biopython==1.84
